prompt_text:
### Demographics: 57-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool); Recurrent nocturnal hypoglycemia (2-4 episodes/month, self-resolved) over the last 3 months.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
MASH
Body mass index category: Overweight
Major Depressive Disorder
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Insulin Glargine 18units once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 75.7 kg; Height 174.4 cm; BMI 24.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 119/61 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.9%; 9 months ago 8.3%; 6 months ago 7.8%; 3 months ago 7.3%; current 7.0%), FPG (12 months ago 206mg/dL; 9 months ago 227mg/dL; 6 months ago 211mg/dL; 3 months ago 148mg/dL; current 146mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 76.9kg; 9 months ago 73.8kg; 6 months ago 72.7kg; 3 months ago 72.2kg; current 75.7kg), Height (12 months ago 174.4cm; 9 months ago 174.4cm; 6 months ago 174.4cm; 3 months ago 174.4cm; current 174.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 119mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 64mmHg; 9 months ago 62mmHg; 6 months ago 63mmHg; 3 months ago 62mmHg; current 61mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 58U/L; 9 months ago 54U/L; 6 months ago 49U/L; 3 months ago 46U/L; current 59U/L), AST (12 months ago 53U/L; 9 months ago 49U/L; 6 months ago 48U/L; 3 months ago 51U/L; current 56U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.3mg/dL; current 1.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 81mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 77mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 77mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 79mL/min/1.73m²; current 78mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 78mg/g; 9 months ago 108mg/g; 6 months ago 103mg/g; 3 months ago 75mg/g; current 93mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 74mg/dL; 9 months ago 77mg/dL; 6 months ago 75mg/dL; 3 months ago 80mg/dL; current 78mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 37mg/dL; 9 months ago 37mg/dL; 6 months ago 34mg/dL; 3 months ago 37mg/dL; current 36mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 107mg/dL; 9 months ago 107mg/dL; 6 months ago 101mg/dL; 3 months ago 117mg/dL; current 112mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.7g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.7g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
